//: Copy to server/sandbox.config.json (or set CCSERVER_SANDBOX_CONFIG) to customize the sandbox.
//docker: true (default): start an isolated rootless dockerd inside the sandbox. false: no docker (lighter, no rootlesskit).
//gpg: true: forward the host gpg-agent (bind ~/.gnupg + the live agent/keyboxd sockets) so commit signing works inside the sandbox using the host's key/token. Coexists with docker. Default false.
//ssh: The SSH agent is auto-forwarded: ccserver finds the user's agent socket (preferring one with keys loaded) at launch and sets SSH_AUTH_SOCK. No config needed. Set env.SSH_AUTH_SOCK to override.
//binds: Extra host paths exposed inside the sandbox, on top of the project dir + ~/.claude + ~/.claude.json (and, with gpg:true, ~/.gnupg). mode: 'ro' (default) or 'rw'. Missing sources are skipped. ~ expands to your home.
//env: Extra environment variables set inside the sandbox (applied last, so they override defaults). e.g. force a specific SSH_AUTH_SOCK.
//claudeBin: How to launch claude. Default: auto — resolve 'claude' on PATH and, if it's a wrapper to the real binary (e.g. /usr/bin/claude -> /opt/claude-code/bin/claude), expose that install dir in the sandbox automatically. Set this only if claude lives somewhere the auto-detect misses, or to pin a specific build. Absolute path recommended. Env var CCSERVER_CLAUDE_BIN overrides this.
